title: crotalaria axillaris
intro: Crotalaria axillaris, also known as Axillaris Bush Calotrope, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Crotalaria genus. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria axillaris include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria axillaris is often combined with other plants to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
